title: Use this map to find the data centers in your backyard
summary: An interactive map created by Isabelle Reksopuro tracks data center construction and AI policy developments, helping residents understand the scale and location of Google's infrastructure expansion. The tool addresses misinformation about data centers as communities question the environmental and land-use implications of AI infrastructure projects.
content:
An interactive map tracking data center construction and AI policy, built by Isabelle Reksopuro.	

When Oregon resident Isabelle Reksopuro heard Google was gobbling up public land to fuel its data centers in her home state, she didn't initially know what to believe. "There's a lot of misinformation about data centers," she said. "Google has denied taking that land." 
Technically, she explains, The Dalles, a city near the Washington state border, sought to reclaim that land, "and Google is just a big, unnamed power user." The city had in fact asked for ownership of a 150-acre portion of Mount Hood National Forest, claiming it needs access to Mount Hood's watershed to meet municipal needs as its population - 16,010 as of the 2020 census -  …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 用这张地图查找你家后院的数据中心
zh.summary: 由伊莎贝尔·雷克索普罗创建的互动地图追踪数据中心建设和人工智能政策发展,帮助居民了解谷歌基础设施扩张的规模和位置。该工具解决了关于数据中心的错误信息,因为社区对人工智能基础设施项目的环保和土地使用影响提出了疑问。

title: Vaporware or not? Aptera assembles its first five validation models.
summary: Aptera, a three-wheel, two-seat electric vehicle in development since 2006, has assembled its first five validation models, suggesting the long-delayed project may finally be moving toward production. This milestone addresses years of skepticism about whether the vehicle was vaporware or a viable commercial product.
content: The three-wheel, two-seat EV has been in development since 2006.

zh.title: 是蒸汽软件还是真实产品?Aptera组装了首批五个验证模型
zh.summary: Aptera是一款自2006年以来一直在开发的三轮两座电动汽车,已组装了首批五个验证模型,表明这个长期延迟的项目最终可能正在向生产阶段迈进。这一里程碑消解了多年来关于该车是否为蒸汽软件或可行商业产品的怀疑。

title: Cisco announces record revenue and 4,000 layoffs in the same day
summary: Cisco announced record revenue alongside 4,000 layoffs, with the company's CFO characterizing the cuts as strategic restructuring rather than cost-cutting. The announcement highlights the disconnect between strong financial performance and significant workforce reductions in tech.
content: Layoffs are "not a savings-driven resutrcture," CFO says.

zh.title: 思科在同一天宣布创纪录的收入和4000人裁员
zh.summary: 思科宣布了创纪录的收入和4000人裁员,公司首席财务官将裁员描述为战略性重组而非成本削减。该公告突出了强劲的财务表现与科技行业大幅员工减少之间的脱节。

title: Cerebras raises $5.5B, then stock pops $108%, in the first huge tech IPO of 2026
summary: AI chip maker Cerebras raised $5.5 billion in its IPO, with shares jumping 108% on the first day of trading—marking 2026's first major tech IPO. The massive market enthusiasm signals renewed investor confidence in AI infrastructure companies after a period of market uncertainty.
content: A year ago, it looked like this day would never happen for Cerebras.

zh.title: Cerebras融资55亿美元首日股价暴涨108%，成为2026年首个重大科技IPO
zh.summary: AI芯片制造商Cerebras在首次公开募股中融资55亿美元，首个交易日股价上涨108%，标志着2026年首个重大科技IPO。巨大的市场热情表明，经历一段市场不确定性后，投资者对AI基础设施公司重燃信心。

title: OpenAI says hackers stole some data after latest code security issue
summary: OpenAI disclosed a code security breach in which hackers stole some data, though the company stated the incident was limited to employee devices and did not compromise user data, production systems, or intellectual property. The disclosure comes amid heightened scrutiny of AI companies' security practices.
content: OpenAI said the damage was limited to the employees’ devices, and did not affect user data nor its production systems, and none of its intellectual property was stolen.

zh.title: OpenAI称黑客在最新代码安全漏洞事件中窃取了部分数据
zh.summary: OpenAI披露了一起代码安全漏洞事件，黑客在其中窃取了部分数据。该公司表示，此次事件仅涉及员工设备，未对用户数据、生产系统或知识产权造成影响。这一披露发生在人工智能公司的安全实践受到广泛审查的背景下。

title: Subnautica 2 is having a huge launch on Steam
summary: Subnautica 2 achieved massive success in its Steam launch, selling over one million copies and reaching 460,000 concurrent players within hours, making it the fourth-most played game on the platform. The underwater survival sequel's performance demonstrates strong demand for the franchise across PC and console platforms.
content:
Subnautica 2, the new underwater survival game from Unknown Worlds, took less than an hour to rocket up Steam's charts. The game has already sold more than one million copies, according to a press release, and as of this writing, Steam's charts show that Subnautica 2 is currently the fourth-most played game on the platform with more than 460,000 concurrent players. The only titles with more concurrent players right now are perennial heavy hitters Counter-Strike 2, Dota 2, and PUBG: Battlegrounds.
It's also worth noting that Steam's Subnautica 2 player count doesn't include players on the Epic Games Store or on Xbox, where the game is also n …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 《深海迷航2》在Steam上迎来大热
zh.summary: 《深海迷航2》在Steam上取得巨大成功，在数小时内销售超过100万份，并达到46万并发玩家，成为该平台上第四大最受欢迎的游戏。这款水下生存续作的成绩表明该系列在PC和游戏机平台上的需求强劲。

title: Leaked images show Microsoft’s new Xbox Cloud Gaming controller
summary: Leaked regulatory filings revealed Microsoft's upcoming Xbox Cloud Gaming controller, a smaller device designed with direct Wi-Fi connectivity for seamless cloud gaming. The controller features 2.4GHz and 5GHz Wi-Fi, Bluetooth 5.3, and USB-C, streamlining the cloud gaming experience.
content:
I revealed earlier this year that Microsoft was working on a new Xbox controller that includes Wi-Fi to connect direct to Xbox Cloud Gaming servers. It now looks like that controller has leaked, thanks to some new images from Brazil's Anatel regulator. 
Tecnoblog published the images today, showing a new, smaller Xbox controller that looks similar to third-party options from 8BitDo and HyperX. The controller is made by Microsoft and includes 2.4GHz and 5GHz Wi-Fi connectivity, Bluetooth 5.3, and a USB-C port. There's also what appears to be some kind of pairing button at the top of the controller, as well as a D-Pad, bumpers, and triggers. 
 …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 泄露图片显示微软新款Xbox云游戏控制器
zh.summary: 监管文件泄露显示微软即将推出的Xbox云游戏控制器，这是一款较小的设备，设计用于直接Wi-Fi连接，实现无缝云游戏。该控制器具有2.4GHz和5GHz Wi-Fi、蓝牙5.3和USB-C接口，简化了云游戏体验。

title: Live updates from Elon Musk and Sam Altman’s court battle over the future of OpenAI
summary: Elon Musk and Sam Altman are in a high-stakes trial over OpenAI's direction, with Musk accusing the company of abandoning its nonprofit mission for profit while Altman defends the organization's independence. The case could reshape AI governance and corporate structure in the industry.
content:
Sam Altman and Elon Musk are facing off in a high-stakes trial that could alter the future of OpenAI and its most well-known product, ChatGPT. In 2024, Musk filed a lawsuit accusing OpenAI of abandoning its founding mission of developing AI to benefit humanity and shifting focus to boosting profits instead. 
Elon Musk, his financial manager and Neuralink CEO, Jared Birchall, and OpenAI cofounder Greg Brockman have already testified before the jury. Shivon Zilis, a former OpenAI board member who shares four children with Musk, took the stand last week, and the courtroom also watched former OpenAI CTO Mura Murati’s videotaped deposition.
For the trial’s third week, Microsoft CEO Satya Nadella appeared on Monday, followed by OpenAI cofounder and former chief scientist Ilya Sutskever. Altman took the stand on Tuesday to refute the Musk argument that he is a liar and a snake, and now on Thursday, May 14th, we will hear the closing arguments, available via an audio live stream on YouTube.
Musk was a cofounder of OpenAI and claims that Altman and Brockman tricked him into giving the company money, only to turn their backs on their original goal. However, OpenAI says that “This lawsuit has always been a baseless and jealous bid to derail a competitor” in a bid to boost Musk’s own SpaceX / xAI / X companies that have launched Grok as a competitor to ChatGPT.
In his lawsuit, Musk is asking for the removal of Altman and Brockman, and for OpenAI to stop operating as a public benefit corporation. Musk has also demanded that OpenAI’s nonprofit receive up to $150 billion in damages he’s asking for if he wins the case.
People to Know
Plaintiff
Elon Musk — plaintiff, OpenAI cofounder and now CEO of rival xAI
Steven Molo — lead counsel for the plaintiff
Jared Birchall — manager of Musk’s family office
Shivon Zilis — former OpenAI board member who shares multiple children with Musk
Defendant
Sam Altman — defendant, CEO of OpenAI 
William Savitt — lead counsel for the defendant
Greg Br

zh.title: 埃隆·马斯克与萨姆·奥特曼OpenAI法庭之争的实时更新
zh.summary: 埃隆·马斯克和萨姆·奥特曼在关于OpenAI发展方向的高风险诉讼中，马斯克指控该公司放弃了其非营利性使命而追求利润，而奥特曼为该组织的独立性进行辩护。该案件可能重塑行业中的人工智能治理和公司结构。

title: Spotify to adopt Apple’s new video podcast tech, offering creators easier cross-platform distribution
summary: Spotify is adopting Apple's HLS video podcast technology to enable creators to distribute and monetize content across both platforms without workflow changes. This partnership simplifies cross-platform podcast distribution and expands monetization opportunities for content creators.
content: Spotify will let creators distribute and monetize video podcasts on Apple Podcasts using Apple’s HLS streaming technology, without changing their existing workflows.

zh.title: Spotify采用苹果新的视频播客技术，为创作者提供更便捷的跨平台分发
zh.summary: Spotify采用苹果的HLS视频播客技术，使创作者能够在两个平台上分发和创收内容，而无需改变工作流程。此合作简化了跨平台播客分发，并为内容创作者扩展了创收机会。

title: Netflix is building an AI animation studio
summary: Netflix is developing an internal AI animation studio called INKubator to produce short-form animated content, according to recent job postings seeking producers, engineers, and CG artists. The move signals the streamer's intent to leverage generative AI for in-house content creation.
content:
Netflix’s job listings indicate an generative AI-heavy animation studio is coming. | Image: The Verge	

This is Lowpass by Janko Roettgers, a newsletter on the ever-evolving intersection of tech and entertainment, syndicated just for The Verge subscribers once a week.
Netflix has been building a new internal studio called INKubator that aims to use AI to produce short-form animated content: The streamer is hiring for a wide variety of roles, including producers, software engineers, and CG artists to staff INKubator, according to a number of recently published job listings.
Netflix has yet to publicly announce its plans for INKubator, which job listings also sometimes refer to as INK. The company did not immediately respond to a request for c …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: Netflix正在建立AI动画工作室
zh.summary: Netflix正在开发一个名为INKubator的内部AI动画工作室，用于制作短视频动画内容。根据最近的招聘信息，公司正在招聘制作人、工程师和CG艺术家。这一举动表明该流媒体平台意图利用生成式AI进行内部内容创作。

title: Americans do not want AI data centers in their backyards
summary: A Gallup survey found that over 70 percent of Americans oppose AI data center construction in their communities, with data centers now less popular than nuclear power plants. The finding presents a significant challenge for AI companies seeking to expand infrastructure across the United States.
content:
Over 70 percent of Americans oppose AI data center construction in their area, according to a new Gallup survey. Just 7 percent said they were "strongly" in favor of new data centers. According to Gallup, data centers are so strongly disliked that Americans would prefer to live near a nuclear power plant than a data center - even at its peak, opposition to nuclear power plant construction topped out at 63 percent. 
Gallup's data is based on a March 2026 survey of 1,000 randomly selected American adults in all 50 US states and the District of Columbia, along with an April 2026 survey of 2,054 adults "who are members of the Gallup Panel." Amo …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 美国人不想在自家后院建AI数据中心
zh.summary: 盖洛普民调发现，超过70%的美国人反对在自己所在社区建立AI数据中心，数据中心现在甚至不如核电站受欢迎。这一发现对寻求在全美范围内扩展基础设施的AI公司构成了重大挑战。

title: Khosla Ventures is betting $10M on Ian Crosby, whose first startup, Bench, imploded
summary: Khosla Ventures invested $10 million in entrepreneur Ian Crosby's new startup Synthetic, an AI-powered bookkeeping service for other startups, despite his previous company Bench's failure. The bet reflects investor confidence in AI automation for business operations and financial management.
content: Crosby is building Synthetic, a fully autonomous AI bookkeeping service for other startups.

zh.title: Khosla风险投资向Ian Crosby下注1000万美元，他的第一家初创公司Bench已倒闭
zh.summary: Khosla风险投资向企业家Ian Crosby的新创业公司Synthetic投资了1000万美元，该公司为其他初创公司提供AI驱动的簿记服务，尽管他之前的公司Bench已经失败。这次投资反映了投资者对AI在商业运营和财务管理自动化方面的信心。

title: The Beats Solo 4 have returned to their best price of the year
summary: Beats Solo 4 wireless headphones are available at $129.95 across major retailers, matching the best price of the year with a $70 discount. The headphones offer lossless audio support, cross-platform compatibility with iOS and Android, and nearly two days of battery life.
content:
The Beats Solo 4 support lossless audio and work with both iOS and Android devices. | Image: The Verge	

If you want a pair of Apple-made wireless headphones that work just as well with Android as with iOS, the Beats Solo 4 are down to around $129.95 ($70 off) at Amazon, Best Buy, and Target. That matches the best price we’ve seen so far this year. While each retailer is offering discounts on the black, light pink, and blue color schemes, Target also has several additional discounted options, including gold.
Beats Solo 4

Where to Buy:

 $199.95 $129.95 at Amazon
 $199.95 $129.99 at Best Buy
 $199.95 $129.99 at Target

Unsurprisingly, the foldable wireless headphones deliver high-quality sound, thanks to support for lossless audio over the included USB-C or 3.5mm audio cable. Like other recent Beats products, the Solo 4 also support native software features in both Android and iOS, including compatibility with Apple’s Find My and Google’s Find Hub, making them easier to track down if they go missing. Android users also get conveniences like automatic device switching, though only iPhone owners can activate head-tracking spatial audio.
We’re big fans of the Beats Solo 4 for other reasons, too. They can last nearly two full days on a single charge, and once the battery runs out, you can keep listening in wired mode. It’s a shame they lack active noise cancellation, but their comfortable memory foam ear cups provide decent passive noise isolation in a pinch, helping block out some noise as you listen. 
Read our full Beats Solo 4 review.

zh.title: Beats Solo 4 已回到其今年最低价格
zh.summary: Beats Solo 4 无线耳机在主要零售商处以 129.95 美元的价格提供，与今年最低价格持平，享受 70 美元的折扣。这款耳机提供无损音频支持、iOS 和 Android 跨平台兼容性，以及近两天的电池续航。

title: How to turn off Instagram’s new Instants feature and retract photos you accidentally shared
summary: Instagram users are seeking ways to disable the new Instants feature after accidentally sharing images they didn't intend to send. The feature, which Meta positioned as a way to share real-life moments, has confused many users unfamiliar with its mechanics and sharing behavior.
content: While the Meta-owned social network billed Instants as a new format to share real-life moments as they’re happening, many users are looking for a way  to turn off the feature, especially those who have accidentally sent images to others, not fully understanding how the feature works.

zh.title: 如何关闭 Instagram 的新 Instants 功能以及撤回您意外分享的照片
zh.summary: Instagram 用户正在寻求关闭新的 Instants 功能的方法，因为他们不小心分享了不想发送的图像。这项功能由 Meta 定位为分享真实时刻的方式，但困惑了许多对其机制和分享行为不熟悉的用户。

title: Razer’s Blade 18 is getting a $500 price hike and a new Intel chip
summary: Razer unveiled its 2026 Blade 18 gaming laptop with Intel's new Core Ultra 9 290HX Plus processor, priced at $3,999.99—a $500 increase from the previous year's model. The upgrade features the same GPU lineup and an 18-inch display claimed to be 20 percent brighter than last year's version.
content:
Razer just announced a new Blade 18 gaming laptop with an Intel Core Ultra 9 290HX Plus chip. The flagship laptop is available now on Razer's site, starting at $3,999.99 with an Nvidia RTX 5070 Ti and configurable with up to an RTX 5090. That starting config is $500 more than the 2025 model with the same GPU, and it comes a year after the 2025 Blade 18 got a price increase before even going on sale.
The new Blade 18 seems very much like a chip bump from Intel Arrow Lake to Arrow Lake Refresh. It has the same GPU offerings as last year and once again a unique dual-mode 18-inch display. Razer claims the screen is 20 percent brighter this year …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: Razer 的 Blade 18 即将涨价 500 美元并搭载新的英特尔芯片
zh.summary: Razer 推出了其 2026 年款 Blade 18 游戏笔记本电脑，搭载英特尔新的 Core Ultra 9 290HX Plus 处理器，价格为 3999.99 美元——比去年型号增加了 500 美元。这次升级保留了相同的 GPU 阵容和 18 英寸显示屏，据称亮度比去年型号提高了 20%。

title: Insta360’s new viewfinder turns the action cam into a retro shooter
summary: Insta360 has released a new optical viewfinder accessory for its Go 3S action camera, enabling it to function as a handheld shooter with a classic film camera aesthetic. The Retro Viewfinder costs $47.99 standalone or is bundled with the camera starting at $299.99, offering a more affordable alternative to the company's LCD dock. The magnetic attachment allows users to frame shots at chest level while maintaining the camera's compact, mountable form factor.
content:
There’s certainly some retro appeal to Insta360’s new action camera accessory.	

The pill-shaped Insta360 Go 3S 4K action camera launched in June 2024 as an updated version of the 2.7K Go 3 that debuted a year prior. While last year’s Go Ultra introduced a redesign with a larger sensor and higher frame rates, the Go 3S has stuck around as a smaller but still very capable alternative. To broaden its appeal, the action cam is now available with a new optical viewfinder accessory for framing shots when using it as a handheld camera, but you may be better off splurging on Insta360’s more expensive dock that adds an LCD screen.
The Retro Viewfinder accessory is available today through Insta360’s online store on its own for $47.99, or as part of a new Go 3S Retro Bundle starting at $299.99 that includes the 64GB version of the action cam. That’s cheaper than the $349.99 Standard Bundle that pairs the same version of the Go 3S with Insta360’s Action Pod dock.
Insta360 GO 3S Retro Bundle

Where to Buy:

 $299.99 at Insta360 (64GB)
 $319.99 at Insta360 (128GB)

As with most tiny action cameras, the Insta360 Go 3S lacks a screen of its own. You can connect it to a smartphone app to see live previews and adjust camera settings, but the Go 3S is designed to be mounted where you wouldn’t be able to see a screen (like atop a helmet) where it captures nearly all the action in front of you using a wide-angle lens.
The new Retro Viewfinder is an attempt to repurpose the action cam as a handheld shooter that lets you frame subjects like a classic camera. It works similar to the Insta360’s Action Pod where the Go 3S slots into the front of the accessory. There’s no spring-loaded latches to keep it securely attached, but a strong magnet kept the camera in place during a vigorous shake test.




Instead of holding the accessory up to your eye to frame shots, you hold it at chest level and look down into the viewfinder. The front panel of the Go 3S functions as your shutter button, snapp

zh.title: Insta360新光学取景器将运动相机变成复古相机
zh.summary: Insta360为其Go 3S运动相机推出了新的光学取景器配件，使其能够作为手持拍摄器材，具有经典胶片相机的美感。零售价格为47.99美元，或与相机捆绑销售起价299.99美元，提供了比LCD基座更经济实惠的选择。磁性附件允许用户在胸部高度取景，同时保持相机的紧凑、可安装形态。

title: I’m obsessed with Forza Horizon 6, and I’ve barely even raced
summary: Forza Horizon 6 excels as an open-world exploration game set in a sprawling fictional Japan, offering players as much freedom to explore and enjoy scenery as to engage in competitive racing. The game significantly improves upon previous entries through its combination of map design and environmental detail, allowing players to experience it at their own pace.
content:
For the last week, I've spent every evening unwinding by speeding through the Japanese countryside, blaring Babymetal as I take in the sights. Forza Horizon 6 is ostensibly a racing game, one in which you play an up-and-coming driver intent on making a name for themselves. But, like the rest of the series, it's also an open world, one in which you can spend as much - or, in my case, substantially more - time exploring as you do racing. And it's that element that's substantially improved in Horizon 6. It's a combination of structure and setting: The fictional take on Japan isn't just the largest map in a Horizon game, but it's also incredibly …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 我迷上了《极限竞速6》，但几乎没有参加过比赛
zh.summary: 作为一款开放世界探险游戏，《极限竞速：地平线6》表现出色，背景设在一个广阔的虚构日本，为玩家提供了尽可能多的自由探索和欣赏风景的机会，就像参加竞争性比赛一样。该游戏通过地图设计和环境细节的完美结合，显著改进了以前的版本，使玩家能够按照自己的步调体验游戏。

title: Desperate Trump taps "Tim Apple," Jensen Huang, Elon Musk to attend Xi summit
summary: Trump is convening a summit with China's Xi Jinping and inviting major tech CEOs including Tim Cook, Jensen Huang, and Elon Musk to attend. The meeting may require Trump to reconsider his aggressive stance on semiconductor tariffs and Taiwan policy given the industry's stakes. This gathering signals potential shifts in U.S.-China tech relations and trade policy.
content: Xi meeting may force Trump to pivot on semiconductor tariffs and Taiwan.

zh.title: 处境困难的特朗普邀请"蒂姆·苹果"、黄仁勋和埃隆·马斯克参加与习近平的峰会
zh.summary: 特朗普正在与中国领导人习近平召开峰会，并邀请包括蒂姆·库克、黄仁勋和埃隆·马斯克在内的主要科技公司CEO参加。鉴于该行业的重要性，这次会议可能要求特朗普重新考虑其在半导体关税和台湾政策上的激进立场。这次聚会表明美中科技关系和贸易政策可能发生转变。

title: You can make an app for that
summary: Advances in AI are enabling non-programmers—including lawyers, doctors, and educators—to build custom applications without learning to code, fundamentally challenging the traditional dynamic where professional developers held exclusive power over software creation. This democratization of software development represents a significant shift in how applications are built and who can build them.
content:
The tyranny of software is almost over. Since the first computer programmers wrote the first computer programs, we, the users of that software, have been forced to live in the worlds those programs create. The features are the features. The design is the design. Want something else, something better? Learn to code, I guess.
Until now, the people making a given piece of software - mostly well-paid professional developers - have rarely been the same as the ones using it: lawyers, doctors, churches, schools, me. (Where they overlap most directly is with developer tools, which are often the best and most passionately designed software you'll  …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 你也能开发应用了
zh.summary: 人工智能的进步使非程序员（包括律师、医生和教育工作者）能够在无需学习编码的情况下构建自定义应用程序，根本上改变了专业开发人员垄断软件创建的传统格局。软件开发的民主化代表了应用构建方式和构建者身份的重大转变。

title: Android’s latest AI feature predicts what you’ll do next
summary: Google is rolling out an AI-powered "contextual suggestions" feature on Android that learns user habits and location patterns to recommend actions, such as playing favorite playlists when arriving at the gym. The feature has expanded from beta to stable release on Pixel devices as part of Google's broader integration of machine learning into everyday phone tasks.
content:
The contextual suggestions feature has started appearing on some Pixel 10 series devices. | Photo: Allison Johnson / The Verge	

Google is rolling out a new AI-powered "contextual suggestions" feature to Android users that recommends actions based on your daily habits, Android Authority reports. The feature is designed to predict your next action based on your location and habits - such as allowing music streaming apps to suggest your usual playlist when you arrive at the gym for your regular workout.
Contextual suggestions were previously available in the Play Services beta, but now Google seems to have expanded it to the stable channel. While Google hasn't announced that the feature has officially launched, some reporters at Android Authority and 9to5Google are see …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: Android最新AI功能预测你的下一步行动
zh.summary: 谷歌正在推出Android上一项由人工智能驱动的"上下文建议"功能，该功能可学习用户习惯和位置模式来推荐操作，例如到达健身房时播放收藏的播放列表。该功能已从Pixel设备上的测试版本扩展到稳定版本，是谷歌将机器学习更广泛地整合到日常手机任务中的一部分。

title: Windows Update will soon automatically roll back faulty drivers
summary: Microsoft is introducing "Cloud-Initiated Driver Recovery," a Windows Update feature that automatically replaces faulty drivers with previously working versions without requiring manual intervention. This addresses a long-standing pain point where problematic driver updates forced users to manually rollback or wait for vendor fixes, improving Windows 11's overall update experience.
content:
Microsoft is on a mission to fix Windows 11, and part of that involves improving the often-frustrating Windows Update experience. While you'll soon be able to pause updates indefinitely, Microsoft is also adding a new feature that automatically rolls back problematic drivers that have been installed through Windows Update.
Microsoft has created a new "Cloud-Initiated Driver Recovery" feature that can replace a faulty driver installed on a PC with a previously working driver through Windows Update. Right now, Windows 11 users have to manually roll back a driver or hardware vendors have to publish a new one to work around any problems, but th …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: Windows Update将自动回滚故障驱动程序
zh.summary: 微软正在推出"云启动驱动程序恢复"功能，这是Windows Update的一项新功能，可自动将故障驱动程序替换为之前可用的版本，无需用户手动干预。这解决了长期存在的痛点，即有问题的驱动程序更新迫使用户手动回滚或等待厂商修复，改善了Windows 11的整体更新体验。

title: Who decides what AI tells you? Campbell Brown, once Meta’s news chief, has thoughts
summary: Campbell Brown, Meta's former news chief, highlights a disconnect between Silicon Valley's vision for AI and consumer concerns about it. The conversation about AI regulation and impact differs significantly between tech industry and public discussions. This gap underscores the challenge of building public trust in AI systems.
content: "The conversation is sort of happening in Silicon Valley around one thing, and a totally different conversation is happening among consumers."

zh.title: 谁决定AI向你说什么？Meta前新闻主管Campbell Brown有想法
zh.summary: Meta前新闻主管Campbell Brown强调了硅谷对AI的愿景与消费者关切之间的脱节。关于AI监管和影响的对话在科技行业和公众讨论之间存在显著差异。这种差距突显了建立公众对AI系统信任的挑战。

title: Clio’s $500M milestone arrives just as Anthropic ups the ante
summary: Legal tech startup Clio has achieved $500 million in annual recurring revenue, reflecting strong market adoption in the legal AI sector. The milestone comes as Anthropic expands its enterprise presence, signaling growing demand for AI-powered legal solutions. This growth demonstrates the viability of AI applications in traditionally conservative professional services.
content: Legal tech startups, including Clio, which just hit $500 million in ARR, are seeing massive customer adoption.

zh.title: Clio达到5亿美元里程碑之际，Anthropic加大赌注
zh.summary: 法律科技初创公司Clio实现了5亿美元的年经常性收入，反映了法律AI领域的强劲市场采用。这一里程碑的到来恰好赶上Anthropic扩大其企业业务，预示着对AI驱动法律解决方案的需求不断增长。这种增长证明了AI应用在传统上保守的专业服务中的可行性。
